# Nick Havryliak — Personal Site

> Second-time, venture-backed founder building at the intersection of AI and Capital markets.

## Who

Nick Havryliak (also Mykola Havryliak) is a founder and systems thinker. He is CEO and co-founder of Assisterr AI. Born in Ukraine, shaped professionally in the United Kingdom, currently based in Asia.

## Current Focus

Assisterr AI — infrastructure for the Service-as-Software transition. Lets anyone build, deploy, and monetize Specialized Language Models (SLMs) and AI agents. 1m+ monthly users, 36k agents deployed, $2.8M raised. Backed by Google for Startups, Outlier Ventures, Web3.com, Moonhill Capital, Echo, and Taisu Ventures.

## What He's Exploring

- Agent quality and evaluation — how agents move from assist to execute at scale
- Private and venture debt tokenization — making private credit yield internet-native
- RWA secondary market liquidity — what it takes to make tokenized assets meaningfully liquid

## Background

Alumni of Cambridge Judge Business School Entrepreneurship Centre, Entrepreneur First, Outlier Ventures, and Google for Startups.

## Writing & Talks

- Assisterr raises $2.8M (EU Startups)
- From ReAct Agents to A2A On-Chain Economies (Agents Day, Dubai)
- Specialized AI by Assisterr (Cointelegraph Interview)
- SLMs & Decentralized AI (YouTube)
- The Role of AI & Crypto in Consumer Apps (Super AI, Singapore)
- Building a Human-Driven Data Economy (Berlin, DePIN Day)
